title: saussurea japonica var. intermedia
intro: Saussurea japonica var. intermedia, also known as Japanese costus root, is a variety of the Saussurea japonica plant, a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and has been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Saussurea japonica var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and other folk remedies.
